test_criteria: Measure brain_state.json size at session #54 (5 sessions later). If >5% without design changes, prediction falsified — indicates uncontrolled growth.

test_criteria: Next 3 sessions: track time-to-first-action (from session start to first meaningful work). Compare with historical average of ~3-5 minutes of file reading.

test_criteria: Next incident investigation: did I use the knowledge_docs field to find the right doc, or did I grep? If grep, prediction falsified — links aren't helpful.
